title: Failed vs Successful Login Correlation
story: SOC received an anomaly alert: a user account has exhibited unusual login patterns.
Multiple failed authentication attempts were followed by a successful login from
an IP address with no prior access history.
This pattern is consistent with credential stuffing or a targeted attack.
Your task: identify the compromised account and the attacker's IP.

objectives.label: Identify the attacker IP that succeeded
Count failed attempts before successful login
Identify the source country/ASN context (IP class)

hints: Correlate 'Failed password' events with 'Accepted password' events per user
Look for IPs that appear in both failed AND successful login events for the same user
The compromised account has exactly 5 failed attempts before success from the same IP
splunk_queries: index=hex_lab sourcetype=hex_case2_* | rex field=_raw "(?<action>Failed password|Accepted password) for (?<user>\w+) from (?<src_ip>[\d.]+)" | stats count by user, src_ip, action | sort user, src_ip
